name: Auth

unions.name: Msg
unions.comment: Describes the events this controller responds to.

unions.name: Status
unions.comment: Auth states of interest to the consumer.

aliases.name: Config
aliases.comment: The configuration specifying the API root to authenticate against.

aliases.name: Credentials
aliases.comment: Username and password based login credentials.

aliases.name: Model
aliases.comment:
The complete state of this auth module. The 'innerModel' is opaque and holds
the private state. The 'state' provides the state as visible to the consumer of
this module.

values.name: getStatus
values.comment: Extracts a summary view of the authentication status from the model.

values.name: login
values.comment: Requests that a login be performed.

values.name: logout
values.comment:
Requests that a logout (including notifying the server of the logout) be
performed.

values.name: refresh
values.comment:
Requests that an attempt be made to refresh the auth token from the refresh
token.

values.name: unauthed
values.comment:
Requests that the auth state be cleared to the LoggedOut state. Usually in
response to receiving a 401 or 403 error from a server.

values.name: update
values.comment: Updates the model from Auth commands.
